work_unit: Deep audit Python web backend (api.py + engine.py)
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete after audit-028 Rust fixes all merged. All workspace projects previously audited. moni-master Python backend (local_simulator/api.py 2033 lines) was the only unaudited major module remaining.
action: Full deep audit of moni-master Python FastAPI backend. Read api.py (full), engine.py (key methods via sonnet sub-agent), models.py, config.yaml. Identified 7 findings (2H/3M/2L): SSRF via LLM proxy, unbounded backtest frames, sync blocking WFO, agent action whitelist bypass, API key leak, no-auth (structural x2). Wrote audit report audit-2026-07-07-029.md. Updated audit-cycle-state to fix-in-progress with 5 pending route-fixes.
outcome_evidence: audit-2026-07-07-029.md written (7 findings, 2H/3M/2L). audit-cycle-state.json updated: status=fix-in-progress, pending_count=5, derived_fixes populated with MONI-PY-001..007. SD-014/SD-015 queued in structural-debt.md.
next_suggestion: 派生 MONI-PY-001 (SSRF) fix — highest severity, route-fix on api.py LLM chat endpoint
派生 MONI-PY-005 (API key leak) fix — high severity, sanitize config in /agent/state/full
派生 MONI-PY-004 (whitelist bypass) fix — medium, add missing actions to _ACTION_KWARGS_WHITELIST

audit_findings.finding: SSRF via LLM chat proxy — user-controlled provider_override.base_url fetched server-side with api_key in Authorization header. No URL allowlist, no scheme/host validation.
audit_findings.remediation: Add URL allowlist for base_url. Validate scheme=https. Reject private/reserved IPs after DNS resolution.

audit_findings.finding: Unbounded BacktestPayload.frames list — no max_length constraint. Memory exhaustion DoS. Mirrors MONI-API-002 (Rust side, fixed).
audit_findings.remediation: Add Field(max_length=500) to frames. Server-side guard in endpoint.

audit_findings.finding: /validation/grid-search calls wfo_engine.run_wfo() synchronously in FastAPI sync endpoint. Blocks event loop for minutes during CPU-heavy Monte Carlo.
audit_findings.remediation: Refactor to AsyncRunStore pattern (same as /wfo/run). Return run_id, let client poll.

audit_findings.finding: _filter_action_args returns args UNFILTERED when action not in whitelist. 8 actions (place_order, update_settings, etc.) pass arbitrary kwargs. update_settings → _deep_update allows config injection.
audit_findings.remediation: Add all dispatched actions to whitelist. Validate update_runtime_settings keys against known config subtrees.

audit_findings.finding: /agent/state/full returns settings: app.state.engine.config with llm.api_key in plaintext. /agent/settings also leaks via get_runtime_settings(). /llm/config GET correctly redacts but these two don't.
audit_findings.remediation: Create sanitize_config() helper. Apply in both endpoints before returning.

audit_findings.finding: No authentication on any of 50+ endpoints including state-mutating ones. Default binds 127.0.0.1 but any local process has full control.
audit_findings.remediation: Add configurable auth middleware. Structural debt SD-014.

audit_findings.finding: WebSocket /ws accepts connections without authentication. Pushes real-time trading events.
audit_findings.remediation: Require auth token before accept. Structural debt SD-015.
